meta.title: Coffee Business Vocabulary — Spaced Repetition Deck
meta.method: Leitner box spaced repetition (5 boxes: 1/2/4/7/14 day intervals). Box 1 = MCQ recognition. Box 2+ = fill-in-the-blank recall.
